props.title: CJ Miller On AI And Copywriting
props.subtitle: Human voice, GEO, AI content tells, and trust moving back offline

cards.title: AI gutted basic copywriting
cards.body: CJ estimates standalone copywriting demand dropped around ninety percent after ChatGPT, pushing agencies toward strategy, expertise, and quality.

cards.title: Human voice is the premium
cards.body: Generic AI content is everywhere. The premium is lived experience, expert perspective, and writing that does not feel over-polished.

cards.title: GEO is mostly good SEO
cards.body: AI search optimization is real, but the fundamentals still matter: structure, topical authority, backlinks, and readable service pages.

cards.title: AI content has tells
cards.body: The group dug into em dash overload, not X but Y framing, polished sameness, and forced punchy sentence fragments.

cards.title: Trust moves back offline
cards.body: As AI outreach floods feeds and inboxes, conferences, in-person meetings, and relationship-driven channels may become more valuable again.
